content.content:
{"body":"
GO:0045022  early endosome to late endosome transport
Definition (GO:0045022 GONUTS page)
The directed movement of substances, in membrane-bounded vesicles, from the early sorting endosomes to the late sorting endosomes; transport occurs along microtubules and can be experimentally blocked with microtubule-depolymerizing drugs. PMID:29980602

Not always microtubule dependent (in fission yeast it's actin dependent)
 remove gloss:
transport occurs along microtubules and can be experimentally blocked with microtubule-depolymerizing drugs

content.content:
[Term]
id: GO:0045022
name: early endosome to late endosome transport
namespace: biological_process
def: "The directed movement of substances, in membrane-bounded vesicles, from the early sorting endosomes to the late sorting endosomes; transport occurs along microtubules and can be experimentally blocked with microtubule-depolymerizing drugs." [ISBN:0815316194, PMID:29980602]
synonym: "endosome maturation" RELATED [PMID:21878991, PMID:29980602]
intersection_of: GO:0016192 ! vesicle-mediated transport
intersection_of: has_target_end_location GO:0005770 ! late endosome
intersection_of: has_target_start_location GO:0005769 ! early endosome
intersection_of: occurs_in GO:0005737 ! cytoplasm
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/26386" xsd:anyURI

input.command:
git add src/ontology/go-edit.obo && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Remove microtubule-dependent gloss from GO:0045022 definition

Updates the definition of GO:0045022 'early endosome to late endosome
transport' to remove the trailing clause about microtubule dependence:
"transport occurs along microtubules and can be experimentally blocked
with microtubule-depolymerizing drugs."

The removed clause over-specifies the mechanism — in fission yeast,
early-to-late endosome transport is actin-dependent rather than
microtubule-dependent, so the gloss is not universally applicable.

Fixes https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31923

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-7`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @ValWood
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/24725790991)
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Remove microtubule-dependent gloss from GO:0045022 definition" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Updates the definition of [GO:0045022 'early endosome to late endosome transport'](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0045022) per request in #31923.

**Before:**
> The directed movement of substances, in membrane-bounded vesicles, from the early sorting endosomes to the late sorting endosomes; transport occurs along microtubules and can be experimentally blocked with microtubule-depolymerizing drugs.

**After:**
> The directed movement of substances, in membrane-bounded vesicles, from the early sorting endosomes to the late sorting endosomes.

## Rationale

The removed clause over-specifies the mechanism. As noted by @ValWood in #31923, early-to-late endosome transport in fission yeast is actin-dependent rather than microtubule-dependent, so the gloss is not universally applicable to all organisms covered by this term. Definition xrefs (ISBN:0815316194, PMID:29980602) preserved.

No changes to logical axioms, relationships, synonyms, or classification.

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN: intent clear — remove microtubule gloss from textual definition
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION: `make travis_build` passed before edits
- [x] RESEARCH: N/A — no new references introduced
- [x] TERM-SEARCH: located GO:0045022 via `obo-grep.pl`
- [x] DESIGN-PATTERNS: N/A — textual definition edit only, no logical-def change
- [x] EDITS: used `obo-checkout.pl` / `obo-checkin.pl` via `terms/GO_0045022.obo`
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS: unchanged
- [x] SPECIALIZED-EDITS: N/A
- [x] METADATA: no new term, no `created_by`/`creation_date` stamping; existing `term_tracker_item` (→ #26386, the original creation issue) preserved
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION: `make travis_build` passed post-edit (all SPARQL checks green, reasoning clean)
- [x] REFERENCE-VALIDATION: N/A
- [x] CHANGES-COMMITTED: single commit touching only `src/ontology/go-edit.obo`
- [x] PR created and linked to #31923

Closes #31923

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-7`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @ValWood
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/24725790991)
EOF
)"

gh issue comment 31923 --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
Definition updated on GO:0045022 to drop the microtubule-dependence clause. New text:

> The directed movement of substances, in membrane-bounded vesicles, from the early sorting endosomes to the late sorting endosomes.

Rationale: as you noted, the mechanism isn't universal — fission yeast uses actin rather than microtubules for this transport, so the gloss was over-specific. Logical axioms, relationships, and synonyms left untouched.

PR: #31938

)"
